title: WELD: The Trusted Exchange
tagline: A trustless marketplace where every completed purchase updates a signed, provably-fresh seller reputation board.
holy_shit: This weld-of-welds keeps live inventory, sealed orders, custody proofs, and seller-signed receipts from the Notarized Marketplace, then injects each completed sale into the Verifiable Tournament flow so seller reputation is signed, freshness-stamped, and impossible to fake-freshen.
powered_by: The Notarized Marketplace end-to-end order trust chain welded to The Verifiable Tournament signed + freshness-stamped leaderboard flow
weld: Keep the full notarized order pipeline intact, then pipe each completed seller-signed receipt into the tournament's sign-plus-freshness leaderboard so seller reputation updates are both attributable and provably live.
agent_scenario: When you need: a zero-backend exchange where buying from a seller emits a custody-proven signed receipt and immediately updates that seller on a cryptographically signed, provably-fresh reputation ranking.
author: kody-w + Copilot
